name: better-godot-mcp
description: Comprehensive Godot Engine integration -- 18 composite mega-tools for scenes, nodes, scripts, physics, UI, animation, audio, navigation, and more
features: 18 composite mega-tools organized in 4 priority tiers (P0-P3)
Scene file CRUD with .tscn text manipulation
Node hierarchy management with property get/set
GDScript file creation, editing, and attachment
Physics collision layer and body configuration
Animation player, track, and keyframe management
Navigation region, agent, and obstacle setup
UI Control node and theme management
